extraction.one_line_summary: PREIDLER Georg attacked inside final kilometer on slight uphill finish, held off YATES Simon who bridged from main group but couldn't come around.
tactical_patterns: BENNETT George attacked 1.5km out on small rise but cracked when TEUNS countered, showing altitude vulnerability despite early strength.
YATES Simon left final sprint launch too late at 400m, needed to jump at 600m before uphill.
LottoNL-Jumbo isolated KIAKOVSKY with three in row opportunity, team failed to support yellow jersey in decisive moments.

rider_signals.BENNETT George: negative: strong enough to solo attack 1.5km out but immediately cracked when countered, questionable finishing power
rider_signals.TEUNS Dylan: positive: appeared dropped on climb but recovered to close gap quickly, superior recovery capacity than expected
rider_signals.KIAKOVSKY Michał: negative: isolated in yellow jersey at 1km with no teammates despite winning two stages, team tactics abandoned him
rider_signals.YATES Simon: neutral: bridged from main group to leaders but mistimed final effort at 400m vs 600m needed
rider_signals.BUCHMANN Emanuel: positive: closed gap to YATES wheel in finale despite not being designated sprinter, underrated finishing speed
